test-code.description: Valid case - compatible types should not trigger violation
Collection.add and Map.put should never trigger violations
Subtype compatibility - should not trigger violations
Supertype compatibility - should not trigger violations
MyList extends ArrayList - should detect incompatible type
MyMap extends HashMap - should detect incompatible key type
MyMap extends HashMap - should detect incompatible value type
MyList and MyMap with compatible types - should not trigger violations
